message:
fix: guard empty-input edge case in normalize_cpu and propagate thread panics in two-lane executor

normalize_cpu:
- Return empty vec immediately when input is empty, avoiding a
  division-by-zero (or NaN propagation) in the softmax normalization
  that follows

ConcurrentTwoLaneExecutor:
- Replace silent swallowing of thread panics (unwrap_or_else returning
  empty defaults) with std::panic::resume_unwind — if either the primary
  or secondary model thread panics, that panic now propagates to the
  caller instead of silently producing empty results that downstream
  selection logic would treat as valid

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
